title: Greatest Estate Developer Paintings
description: This mod is based on the popular manhwa "The Greatest Estate Developer".
body:
![Paintings](https://i.imgur.com/2B3Obd7.png)

![Paintings](https://i.imgur.com/YcsVXSL.jpeg)

With the series nearing its final chapter, I created this project to honor one of its most iconic characters, Lloyd Frontera. It's a special way to celebrate the story and the legacy of a character who has meant so much to fans.
